creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
> looks like pkubaj@ fixed this port similarly:
>    https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=5c4975a092a5
> without a by-your-leave

Actually, Piotr, the above commit fixed things for FreeBSD-14, but broke things for the still-supported FreeBSD-13, where the compiler does not know about this warning:

> error: unknown warning option '-Werror=vla-cxx-extension'; did you mean '-Werror=vla-extension'? [-Werror,-Wunknown-warning-option]

Please, revert your commit and consider adding my patch instead -- perhaps, along with the LICENSE-addition suggested by Zsolt. Thank you!
